hero.name: Jefry Kurniawan
hero.title: Backend Developer & .NET Specialist
hero.subtitle: 5+ years building enterprise .NET applications, RESTful APIs, and data-driven systems — with a growing passion for AI-powered software development.

about.title: About Me
about.description: Results-driven Backend Developer with 5+ years of expertise in .NET (C#, VB.NET) and Microsoft SQL Server, delivering production-grade applications across banking, insurance, HR, and government sectors. Currently building high-performance backend systems and RESTful APIs at PT Xtremax Teknologi Indonesia, with prior experience leading technical teams through full enterprise software lifecycles. Beyond core .NET development, I continuously expand my technical horizon — building full-stack applications with React and Next.js, containerising services with Docker, and exploring AI integration using Microsoft Semantic Kernel and OpenAI APIs. Passionate about clean, maintainable code and software solutions that genuinely drive business value.

coding_id.name: .NET Programmer Class
coding_id.description: Completed an intensive .NET programming course covering ASP.NET MVC, C#, and Microsoft SQL Server.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new opportunities, projects, or just having a chat about technology.
